description:
Badboy, one of the best dating coaches in the world and the dating secrets revealed. Are there secrets, you will find out.

Badboy is one of the best dating and Lifestyle coaches in the World. Inventor of Direct and Natural Game. Voted for NO#1 PUA in the world 2 times (2013 & 2014). One of the characters described in the bestselling book “The Game” by Neil Strauss.
